name: codemap-boost-codex
description: CodeMap workflow for Codex using code-review-graph MCP guidance, synchronized graph refresh barriers, and AGENTS.md instructions.

interface.shortDescription: Nudge Codex toward code-review-graph for code structure work.
interface.longDescription: Automatically bootstraps code-review-graph from SessionStart, maintains Codex-native CodeMap guidance in AGENTS.md, builds or updates graphs from hooks without editing project .gitignore during passive sessions, and nudges prompts, shell searches, and subagents toward graph-aware code exploration.
defaultPrompt: Set up CodeMap Boost for this Codex environment.
